name: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Flows
notes:
This Building Block triggers when a cryptocurrency mining file hash is observed.

Note: Populate the Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes Reference Set with relevant file hashes.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow matches "File Hash" is NOT NULL AQL filter query
when any of File Hash are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches "File Hash" is NOT NULL AQL filter query
AND when any of File Hash are contained in any of Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes - AlphaNumeric
